title: Ground Turkey Egg Roll in a Bowl (High-Protein Recipe) | Eati
introduction: Ground Turkey Egg Roll in a Bowl gives you egg-roll flavors without the wrapper. It is high-protein, fast, and easy to portion, making it a great meal prep option for your Eati logging.

sections.heading: Ingredients
sections.content:
- Ground turkey
- Cabbage
- Carrots
- Soy sauce
- Ginger
- Garlic
- Sesame oil (optional)
- Salt and pepper

sections.heading: Instructions
sections.content:
1. Brown ground turkey in a pan with garlic and a pinch of salt.
2. Add ginger and stir until fragrant.
3. Saute cabbage and carrots until slightly tender.
4. Add soy sauce and combine; cook until flavors blend.
5. Finish with optional sesame oil, serve warm, and log your portion in Eati.

sections.heading: Calories, Fat, and Protein (Estimated)
sections.content:
Calories: 243 kcal per serving (estimated)
Fat: 8.2g
Protein: 30g

Tip: reduce oil to keep fat lower while keeping flavor through seasonings.

conclusion: This bowl is a convenient way to stay high-protein and consistent. Track it in Eati and adjust your portion size as needed.
